content.problemStatement:
Two players are playing a game. They are given an array A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ as well as an array B1,B2,…,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1​,B2​,…,BM​.

The game consists of MMM rounds. Players are participating in rounds alternatively. During the iii-th round (for iii from 111 to MMM) the corresponding player (first player, if iii is odd, and second if iii is even) has to do exactly one of the following:



remove all elements from the array AAA that **are divisible** by BiB_iBi​,




remove all elements from the array AAA that **are not divisible** by BiB_iBi​.



The first player wants to minimize the sum of the remaining elements in the array AAA after all MMM rounds, and the second wants to maximize it. Find the sum of the remaining elements in the array AAA after all MMM rounds if both players are playing optimally.


Input Format
The first line contains two integers NNN, MMM −-− the length of the array AAA and the number of rounds in the game.


The second line contains NNN integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​  −-− the elements of the array AAA.


The third line contains MMM integers B1,B2,…,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1​,B2​,…,BM​ −-− the elements of the array BBB.



Output Format
Output a single integer −-− the sum of the remaining elements of the array AAA after all MMM rounds if both players are playing optimally.
constraints: **Subtask 1 (22 points):** Bi+1 mod Bi=0B_{i + 1} \bmod B_i = 0Bi+1​modBi​=0 (1≤i<M1 \leq i \lt M1≤i<M)

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
In the sample, one possible flow of the game is the following:


Round 111: first player removes from AAA all elements divisible by 222. AAA becomes (5,7)(5, 7)(5,7).


Round 222: second player removes from AAA all elements divisible by 555. AAA becomes (7)(7)(7). If he had removed from AAA all elements not divisible by 555, AAA would become (5)(5)(5), which has a smaller sum of elements and therefore is not desirable for the second player.
